title: More stonecutter crafts
body:
**More Stonecutter Crafts**

This mod adds missing stonecutter recipes that should have been in the game from the start

Stop wasting your resources on a crafting table when you can use a stonecutter more efficiently!

**Main features:**

- Polished Tuff recipe

- Normal Tuff recipe

- Polished Deepslate recipe

- Polished Blackstone recipe

- Polished Andesite, Diorite and Granite recipe

- Normal versions of Andesite, Diorite and Granite recipe
__________________________________________________________________________
